channel.title: 音楽ニュースリスト - Bluesky Feed
channel.description: 音楽ニュースサイトの発信をまとめて確認するためのリスト

item.author: Stereogum (@stereogum.com)
item.description: Liverpool legends Echo & The @bunnymen.com announce 'Apples For Isaac', their first new album in 12 years; hear their new single "Brussels Is Haunted"
item.content:encoded: Liverpool legends Echo & The @bunnymen.com announce 'Apples For Isaac', their first new album in 12 years; hear their new single "Brussels Is Haunted"

item.title: The Trump administration wants to install permanent fencing …
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: The Trump administration wants to install permanent fencing around Lafayette Park, directly outside the White House. It's long been a popular spot for protesters, who worry barriers will change that. n.pr/3RiihMz
item.content:encoded: The Trump administration wants to install permanent fencing around Lafayette Park, directly outside the White House. It's long been a popular spot for protesters, who worry barriers will change that. n.pr/3RiihMz

item.title: Higher oil prices since the Iran war began mean many oil com…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: Higher oil prices since the Iran war began mean many oil companies have brought in excess profits. Some U.S. lawmakers want to tax those windfall profits and give the money to lower-income Americans. n.pr/4fimkk9
item.content:encoded: Higher oil prices since the Iran war began mean many oil companies have brought in excess profits. Some U.S. lawmakers want to tax those windfall profits and give the money to lower-income Americans. n.pr/4fimkk9

item.title: In their new book, photographers Cheyenne Clementi and Valen…
item.author: DJ Mag (@djmag.com)
item.description:
In their new book, photographers Cheyenne Clementi and Valentina Morandi collect over 160 images that document their formative years in Europe’s free-party scene, and the familial sense of community with in it

@danieldylanwray.bsky.social spoke to them about 10 key shots

djmag.com/never-alone-...
item.content:encoded:
In their new book, photographers Cheyenne Clementi and Valentina Morandi collect over 160 images that document their formative years in Europe’s free-party scene, and the familial sense of community with in it

@danieldylanwray.bsky.social spoke to them about 10 key shots

djmag.com/never-alone-...

item.title: The political implications the war in Iran is having on the …
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: The political implications the war in Iran is having on the GOP. And, a new report has found that ICE officers' use of force is not rare since President Trump took office for his second term. n.pr/4f4YXM7
item.content:encoded: The political implications the war in Iran is having on the GOP. And, a new report has found that ICE officers' use of force is not rare since President Trump took office for his second term. n.pr/4f4YXM7

item.title: The Federal Highway Administration quietly stripped bike lan…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: The Federal Highway Administration quietly stripped bike lanes and other safety recommendations from a key list of best practices. Critics say those measures are proven to cut crashes and save lives. n.pr/4yoz3dD
item.content:encoded: The Federal Highway Administration quietly stripped bike lanes and other safety recommendations from a key list of best practices. Critics say those measures are proven to cut crashes and save lives. n.pr/4yoz3dD

item.title: President Trump said TrumpRx is the biggest thing to happen …
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: President Trump said TrumpRx is the biggest thing to happen in healthcare in decades. But an NPR analysis finds drugmakers are only offering deals on a few of their medicines. n.pr/45aRaGw
item.content:encoded: President Trump said TrumpRx is the biggest thing to happen in healthcare in decades. But an NPR analysis finds drugmakers are only offering deals on a few of their medicines. n.pr/45aRaGw

item.title: In recent days, federal immigration agents fatally shot two …
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: In recent days, federal immigration agents fatally shot two immigrant fathers. None of the federal officers involved were wearing body cameras, the agency said. n.pr/4fiawOC
item.content:encoded: In recent days, federal immigration agents fatally shot two immigrant fathers. None of the federal officers involved were wearing body cameras, the agency said. n.pr/4fiawOC

item.title: An ACLU report looks at the widespread use of force in immig…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: An ACLU report looks at the widespread use of force in immigration enforcement in the first year of President Trump's return to office. Recent fatal shootings in Texas and Maine have brought renewed scrutiny to the agency's tactics. n.pr/4w6xy2b
item.content:encoded: An ACLU report looks at the widespread use of force in immigration enforcement in the first year of President Trump's return to office. Recent fatal shootings in Texas and Maine have brought renewed scrutiny to the agency's tactics. n.pr/4w6xy2b

item.title: Key voters in Pennsylvania are split on whether President Tr…
item.author: NPR (@npr.org)
item.description: Key voters in Pennsylvania are split on whether President Trump earning a big windfall last year is a big deal or not. Their reaction reveals a level of cynicism about many in the political class. n.pr/4vxLYYc
item.content:encoded: Key voters in Pennsylvania are split on whether President Trump earning a big windfall last year is a big deal or not. Their reaction reveals a level of cynicism about many in the political class. n.pr/4vxLYYc

item.description:

https://natalie.mu/music/news/681182?utm_source=bluesky&utm_medium=social

#ハンブレッダーズ

・どっかん小僧
・Oo
・たのし
・ボタン
・Comical Fighters
・ぞうつかいになった。
・Umibenomachi
・ショーウエムラ（アフターアワーズ）
・ミヤザキナツキ（砂場）
・宮島孝輔（To Be Honest）
の11組追加
